rewrite_verification.notes: SEGMENTS[0].shapeId is canonical resolver id bTIIh (ir/inventory.json entity id), not Bubble pointer-path id bTIIm (/element_definitions/bTIHs/elements/bTIIW/elements/bTIIm). data-bubble-id on segment-1 Shape renders bTIIh.

criteria_audit.notes: Root div data-bubble-id="bTIHr"; score prop typed number clamped 1–5 via clampScore(); optional labels[] prop; exported from design-system barrel

Five groups bTIIU/bTIIO/bTIII/bTIII/bTIIC/bTIHw each wrap Shape children with canonical ids bTIIh/bTIIn/bTIIt/bTIIz/bTIJF; cumulative fill uses var(--color_primary_default) on shapes, track groups use var(--color_aiRNbAaxgr_default)

Segment row flex flex-row gap-1 (4px); min-h-[8px] rounded-[4px] tracks; bTIJL HTML style scaffold preserved sr-only with dangerouslySetInnerHTML; dynamic max-width rules implemented in React (filled ? max-w-full : max-w-0)

functional_audit.check: ScoreBar exports from design-system barrel, clamps score 1–5, and optional onChange enables interactive radiogroup

ui_evidence.notes: Segment-1 Shape — canonical id bTIIh (not pointer-path bTIIm); B-1 fix confirmed
HTML element: static #bar1–#bar5 style scaffold from Bubble; dynamic width in React

critiques.finding: Bubble bTIJL is a style-injection HTML node only (no visible axis-label copy in drsam-99657.bubble); ScoreBar adds an optional labels[] row below the segment track that has no IR counterpart.
critiques.alternative: Defer label rendering to downstream journal/check-in screens that bind segment copy, or document labels[] as intentional SPA extension for reuse ergonomics.

critiques.finding: bTIJL is rendered as an sr-only sibling inside the segment flex row; Bubble places bTIJL as a separate child of bTIHr after the five segment groups.
critiques.alternative: Move bTIJL outside the segment row (still sr-only) to mirror parent_element_id sibling order if parity tooling depends on DOM structure.
